overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city district. The player character moves from a covered outdoor dining area through neon-lit plazas and underpasses, passing street vendors and storefronts in an atmospheric urban environment with reflective wet pavement and dramatic neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor dining patio with pink neon lighting

events.description: exits the covered dining patio into the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking past the outdoor dining area with pink neon lights, moving toward the open plaza

entered.detail: raised concrete platform with red outdoor furniture under a metal roof structure
horizontal magenta neon tube lighting running along the ceiling of the dining area
large cylindrical concrete column supporting the overhead structure
red plastic tables and chairs arranged on the dining platform

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a semi-covered outdoor dining area illuminated by vibrant pink neon lights. The camera moves forward past concrete support pillars and red outdoor furniture, transitioning from the sheltered patio toward an open urban plaza with wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with street food vendor

events.description: approaching a food stall with bright green neon lighting
pedestrian ahead stops briefly near the food stall before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet plaza pavement toward a food stall with green neon lighting

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the food stall, wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: street vendor booth with bright turquoise-green neon lighting and display cases
tall illuminated advertisement screen showing commercial content
elevated highway or monorail track running horizontally across the scene
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting the neon lights and street lamps

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open plaza with wet reflective pavement, the scene features a food stall with distinctive green neon lighting on the right. A pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction while digital billboards and an overpass structure become visible in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with pharmacy and storefronts

events.description: passing the pharmacy entrance with glowing green medical cross sign

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing the pharmacy and various storefronts

notable_agents.action: standing near the pharmacy entrance, appearing to browse or wait

entered.detail: storefront with dark facade and illuminated signage reading PHARMACY
bright green neon cross symbol indicating medical facility
horizontal red neon signage above the pharmacy entrance
large digital advertisement screens mounted on the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial street lined with storefronts, dominated by a pharmacy with a bright green neon medical cross. The camera moves past the pharmacy entrance where a pedestrian stands, while overhead billboards on the approaching overpass display advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: entering the narrow enclosed corridor beneath the overpass structure
lighting shifts from bright neon to dimmer artificial overhead lights in the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow underpass corridor with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall of the underpass structure with weathered texture
wall covered in colorful spray paint graffiti and street art
exposed metal beams and concrete ceiling of the overpass directly overhead
metal grid ventilation panels set into the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow enclosed walkway beneath the overpass, characterized by graffiti-covered concrete walls and dim artificial lighting. The ceiling features exposed metal girders and the space feels confined compared to the open plaza, with ventilation grates visible on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under overpass with scattered debris

events.description: passing piles of blue and white trash bags on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street under the overpass, passing a pedestrian on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking on the sidewalk in the opposite direction, wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: clusters of blue and white garbage bags piled on the sidewalk and ground
tall metal lamppost with bright overhead illumination
dark asphalt street with yellow lane markings and manhole covers
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible in the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens to a wider street beneath the overpass, lined with trash bags and debris. A pedestrian walks in the opposite direction on the left sidewalk while street lamps illuminate the wet asphalt. The overpass structure recedes into the distance as tall city buildings become visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit dining patio into the gritty, enclosed underbelly of a rain-soaked city. It begins under the pink glow of a sheltered outdoor area, moving past concrete pillars and red furniture toward an open plaza where the pavement reflects the surrounding lights. As the camera advances, the scene shifts past a green-lit food stall and a pharmacy marked by a glowing medical cross, while digital billboards on a distant overpass begin to dominate the skyline. The environment then tightens into a narrow, dim walkway beneath the overpass, characterized by graffiti-covered walls and exposed metal girders. Finally, the space opens back up into a wider street lined with debris and street lamps, with the overpass receding as towering city buildings emerge through the nighttime haze.
